InterviewSession.title: InterviewSession
InterviewSession.description: An interactive mock interview session with candidate configuration, step-by-step turns, speech analytics, and performance evaluation.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this session

turns.description: A collection of interviewer turns containing question, candidate answer, speech analytics, attention metrics, and evaluation

startTime.description: ISO timestamp indicating when the session began

endTime.description: ISO timestamp indicating when the session concluded

status.description: Current status of the interview session

finalReport.description: The AI-generated performance report card summary

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile with cumulative score, streak, active date, and personalized daily goals.

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Authentication

displayName.description: User's nickname or chosen display name

totalScore.description: Cumulative score earned through mock interview sessions

dailyGoals.description: List of personalized daily goals with completion states

/sessions/{sessionId}.description: Collection of mock interview sessions saved by candidates

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles with scores, streaks, and personalized daily goals
